spouse_indicators.description: Comprehensive spouse prediction system based on aaps.space Spouse Indicator and Vedic astrology
spouse_indicators.methodology: Uses D1 (Rashi/Lagna), D9 (Navamsa), and derivative charts for spouse characteristics prediction

first_impression.name: First Impression Indicator
first_impression.description: Derived from basic signals in Kundli chart (D1) and Navamsa chart (D9)
forecasts: Spouse characteristics based on strength in Kundli and Navamsa

type_of_marriage.name: Type of Marriage Indicator
type_of_marriage.description: Predicts whether marriage is arranged by parents or love marriage

indicators.arranged_marriage_strong: Parents' influence is greater than individual in choice of life partner
indicators.love_marriage_strong: Individual has greater influence than parents in choice of life partner

type_of_marriage.fortune_snippets: Accurately tracks if charts match with strong predictive rules from older texts - very strong indications when present

family_and_background.name: Family and Background Indicator
family_and_background.description: Checks if spouse comes from well-to-do family compared to native's family
additional_insights: Spouse may have better profession/status/money than native
Or reverse case where native's profession/status is better than spouse

samskaar.name: Samskaar of Spouse
samskaar.description: Indicates natural and honourable qualities spouse might possess

nature.name: Nature of Spouse
nature.description: Looks at dominant planets determining qualities of spouse
nature.complex_derivatives: May give complex qualities due to influence of one or more planets

chemistry.name: Chemistry of Couple Indicator
chemistry.description: Tells about person's skills in handling relationship with spouse
chemistry.note: This indicator tells more about yourself than about your spouse
chemistry.calculation: Uses overall average from different charts and astrological methods

physique.name: Physique of Spouse
physique.description: Experimental indicator predicting certain body parts and beauty
physique.note: Use to get clues about physique, not face value predictions
physique.reference: Based on planets in 7th house - Brihat Parasara Hora Shastra

sukh_of_married_life.name: Sukh of Married Life
sukh_of_married_life.description: Overall bliss and happiness in married life
sukh_of_married_life.importance: Very important indicator made up of many different components

technical_indicators.description: Advanced indicators for detailed astrological analysis

interpretation.dark_red_black_yellow: Difficulties finding partner, longer time than usual, delay in marriage expected

foundations_of_marriage.name: Foundations of Marriage

interpretation.strong: People judge you as capable of getting very good spouse
interpretation.weak: People might think opposite about your prospects

foundations_of_marriage.note: Talks about the tree (foundation), not the fruits (actual spouse)

fruits_of_marriage.name: Fruits of Marriage
fruits_of_marriage.description: Shows what kind of spouse you will actually get

interpretation.good_strength: Spouse who practically makes life much better - good looks, money, or qualities

results_of_married_life.name: Results of Married Life
results_of_married_life.description: Confirms strength of Fruits of Marriage indicator
results_of_married_life.combination: If both Fruits of Marriage and Results show good strength = blissful married life
results_of_married_life.exception: Only Chemistry of Couple indicator can make married life bad in this case

luck_in_wife.name: Luck in Wife/Law's House
luck_in_wife.description: How easy life gets once you bring wife or go to husband's house
luck_in_wife.importance: Very good quality of married life indicator when paired with others

rtn_ntr.name: RTN and NTR Charts
rtn_ntr.description: Rashi Tulya Navamsa chart and Navamsa Tulya Rashi chart
rtn_ntr.importance: Indicators from two very important derivative charts

seventh_amsa_lord.name: 7th Amsa Lord
seventh_amsa_lord.significance: Very important for marriage timing and spouse characteristics

compound_characteristics.name: Compound Characteristics of Wife/Husband
compound_characteristics.combination: Combining Qualities in wife/husband + Nature of wife/husband indicators
compound_characteristics.result: Weapon to know how good spouse is in eyes of everyone around

seventh_house_planets.description: Spouse characteristics based on planets in 7th house (Brihat Parasara Hora Shastra)

appearance.voice: Very deep or not very pleasant sounding

Sun.family: Comes from respectable family, might belong to well-known extended family

appearance.look: Very good looking, charming and fair-looking

Moon.note: Really good planet to have for lovely life partner
Moon.variation: If waning moon, complexion not as fair as waxing moon

physical_traits.breasts: Hard and prominent breasts (for female spouse)

Saturn.note: May give undesirable, unsupportive, average-looking spouse

navamsa_houses.description: Significance of each house in Navamsa chart for marriage

second_house.name: 2nd House of Navamsa
significations: Family after wedding (you, spouse and children)

fourth_house.name: 4th House of Navamsa
significations: For man: Whether wife would be housewife or working woman
For woman: Privileges owing to husband's career

ninth_house.name: 9th House of Navamsa
significations: How partner influences philosophical and spiritual beliefs

tenth_house.name: 10th House of Navamsa
significations: How others view you as a couple

twelfth_house.name: 12th House of Navamsa
significations: Ability to enjoy wealth and material aspects
Journey after marriage or distance travel

vargottama.name: Vargottama Navamsa
vargottama.description: Planet in same zodiac sign in Rashi chart and Navamsa chart
vargottama.significance: As capable as planet in its own sign for that divisional chart

pushkar_navamsa.name: Pushkar Navamsa
pushkar_navamsa.description: Specific degrees in Navamsa that are highly auspicious

spouse_indicators.source: aaps.space - Spouse Indicator, Navamsa Chart, and 7th House Analysis
